---
title: "CV"
pagetitle: "CV | Ian Phillips"
body-class: cv-page
---

::: {.cv-download}
[Download full CV](files/cv/ian-phillips-cv.pdf)
:::

## Current position

**Bloomberg Distinguished Professor of Philosophy and Psychological & Brain Sciences**  
William H. Miller III Department of Philosophy  
Department of Psychological & Brain Sciences  
Johns Hopkins University

## Selected affiliations

::: {.subtle-links}

Associate Principal Investigator, [Perception & Mind Lab](https://perception.jhu.edu/)  
Member, [Foundations of Mind](https://mind.jhu.edu/)   
Visiting Professor in Philosophy, [Oxford University](https://www.ox.ac.uk/), Trinity terms

:::

## Research areas

Philosophy of mind  
Vision science  
Perception  
Consciousness  
Memory  
Mental imagery  
Temporal experience  

## Publications

::: {.subtle-links}

See [Papers](papers.qmd).

:::

## Contact

::: {.subtle-links}

See [Contact](contact.qmd).

:::
